content:
i will attach the artwork i designed for my remixes;

this idea of the design gestated in my head since introduction to cubist paintings i began traveling to NYC (MOMA, MET, and others) with friends during this period, i visited every few months with different friend combinations [Jessica, Rob, Megan, Jill, Mike (not all of at once, but combined in some forms for sure) with Mariel as a date and with gabe many times and on acid ( one acid trip, on the return, on the verrazano bridge, his tire blew and we waited for police escort, the bridge swayed up and down when we were standing still, the cops yelled at me for taking pics of the views, and we had no cash for tipping the tow truck, also the trip , listening to FKA Twigs LP1, gabe explained his external world pain that hurt so internally and his love so vast, he cried as he told me);

next phase (will go into detail next prompt):

two new study iterations of cubism;
a triptych cubist video study for nonfiction workshop;
a cubist music video i created for Locreance;
a multi angle short film cubist study never released;
context: From document: i've been generating creative work since i was around 12 years old… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/13)
